title: lithocarpus microbalanus
intro: Lithocarpus microbalanus, also known as the Bur Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to China, characterized by its broad, rounded crown and thick, rugged bark. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus microbalanus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. Lithocarpus microbalanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
